.status-bar.background: rgb(227, 228, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(243, 244, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(243, 244, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(243, 244, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(26, 115, 232, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(243, 244, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(227, 228, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(227, 228, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(243, 244, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(227, 228, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(248, 249, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(248, 249, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(248, 249, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
